chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

parts.text: أَخِيهِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ

text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ بِامْرَأَةٍ فَلَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا فَزَنَى مَا عَلَيْهِ قَالَ "يُجْلَدُ اَلْحَدَّ وَ يُحْلَقُ رَأْسُهُ وَ يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِهِ وَ يُنْفَى سَنَةً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4451 - Ali ibn Ja'far narrated from his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as):
I asked Imam (as) about a man who married a woman but did not consummate the marriage and then committed adultery.
Imam (as) said: "He shall be lashed with the prescribed punishment (hadd), his head shall be shaved, he shall be separated from his wife, and he shall be exiled for one year."
